overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy neon-lit waterfront boardwalk at night. The journey transitions through commercial food stalls with a discovered crime scene, a dark wooded trail with a burning barrel, and returns to an urban concrete walkway with stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit waterfront boardwalk with overhead highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk, approaching the yellow food kiosk ahead

entered.detail: wet wooden planks reflecting cyan neon lights
metal safety railings along the boardwalk edge
tall cylindrical cyan neon light fixtures
small yellow and green food vendor booth with service window
elevated highway structure with support columns
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night along a wooden waterfront boardwalk illuminated by cyan neon lights. The camera follows the character walking forward past metal railings, approaching a yellow food kiosk while an elevated highway overpass looms ahead against a backdrop of distant skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall plaza with outdoor seating and neon signage

events.description: discovers a dead body lying in a pool of blood in front of the GIRAS food stall

agents.ego_description: walking past the yellow kiosk and approaching the GIRAS food stall, observing the dead body on the ground

entered.detail: food vendor stall with blue and red GIRAS signage and service counter
corpse lying on the ground with blood pool nearby
tables and stools under large umbrellas with pink neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a food vendor plaza, passing the yellow kiosk and discovering a dead body in front of the GIRAS food stall. The area features outdoor seating with umbrellas illuminated by pink neon lights, transitioning from wooden decking to paved tiles.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded trail with burning barrel and scattered debris

events.description: transitions from paved plaza to dirt trail through dense vegetation
passes a burning barrel emitting orange light on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dark wooded area on a narrow dirt path, passing a burning barrel

entered.detail: unpaved dirt path with scattered rocks and debris
metal barrel with open fire providing orange illumination
thick forest vegetation lining both sides of the trail
large boulders and rock formations beside the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the commercial plaza, the character enters a densely wooded area with a dirt trail. The path is flanked by thick vegetation and rocks, with a burning barrel providing warm orange light against the cool neon glow filtering through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban walkway with concrete stairs and modern buildings

events.description: emerges from wooded trail back to paved urban walkway
begins ascending slight incline alongside concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up the paved path alongside concrete stairs, heading toward the illuminated buildings ahead

entered.detail: wet concrete pavement reflecting neon lights
wide concrete staircase ascending alongside the path
concrete wall with colorful graffiti tags
tall contemporary structures with illuminated windows and signage
tall palm trees lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the woods, the character returns to an urban environment with paved walkways and concrete stairs ascending on the right. The path leads toward modern illuminated buildings, with a graffiti-covered wall and palm trees visible as the foggy neon-lit night continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit waterfront that transitions from a commercial boardwalk into a dark wooded trail before returning to an urban concrete landscape. It begins on a foggy wooden boardwalk illuminated by cyan lights, following the character past metal railings and under a looming highway overpass toward a yellow food kiosk. As the camera moves into a vendor plaza, the wooden decking shifts to paved tiles and pink neon lighting, revealing a dead body positioned in front of a food stall. The scene then shifts away from the commercial area and into a densely wooded trail where thick vegetation and rocks surround a burning barrel that casts a warm orange glow. Finally, the camera emerges from the woods back onto paved walkways and concrete stairs, passing graffiti-covered walls and palm trees toward modern illuminated buildings under the persistent foggy night.
